name: [TC-1101] Post Internal Transfer TX-IT1 (A1 → A2) and Verify
steps:
1. Go to /transactions/internal-transfer
   - From: HBL Main (A1)
   - To: Cash Box (A2)
   - Amount: 25000
   - Date: 2026-03-25
2. Save Draft → verify NO side effects
3. Post
4. Check /payment-accounts/detail/[A1_ID]:
   - Balance = PKR 76,400 (101,400 - 25,000)
   - Statement: outflow entry 2026-03-25, PKR 25,000
5. Check /payment-accounts/detail/[A2_ID]:
   - Balance = PKR 55,000 (30,000 + 25,000)
   - Statement: inflow entry 2026-03-25, PKR 25,000
6. Check / Dashboard: Cash & Bank = PKR 148,600 (UNCHANGED — net zero)
7. Verify: A1 PKR 76,400 + A2 PKR 55,000 + A3 PKR 17,200 = PKR 148,600
expected_result:
- A1: PKR 76,400 (decreased)
- A2: PKR 55,000 (increased)
- Dashboard total: PKR 148,600 (no change — key check)
- Suppliers, customers, stock: all unchanged
notes: RECORD TX-IT1 ID. Net-zero effect on total cash is the critical check here.

name: [TC-1102] Post Internal Transfer TX-IT2 (A2 → A3)
steps:
1. Transfer: From Cash Box (A2), To JazzCash (A3), Amount 10000, Date 2026-03-26
2. Post
3. A2 balance = PKR 45,000 (55,000 - 10,000)
4. A3 balance = PKR 27,200 (17,200 + 10,000)
5. Dashboard Cash & Bank = PKR 148,600 (still unchanged)
6. Final breakdown: A1 76,400 + A2 45,000 + A3 27,200 = 148,600
expected_result:
- A2: PKR 45,000
- A3: PKR 27,200
- Dashboard total: PKR 148,600

name: [TC-1103] Transfer Validation Tests
steps:
Test A: From = HBL Main, To = HBL Main (same account)
  Expected: blocked — 'Cannot transfer to same account'
Test B: From = JazzCash (PKR 27,200), Amount = 99,999 (more than balance)
  Expected: note behavior — blocked or allowed (overdraft)
Test C: Amount = 0
  Expected: validation error
Test D: Amount = -500
  Expected: validation error or input blocked
For B: delete draft without posting
expected_result:
- Same account: blocked
- Zero amount: blocked with error
- Negative amount: blocked
- Overdraft: note behavior (blocked or allowed)
notes: Do NOT post the overdraft test

name: [TC-1201] Post Stock Adjustment IN TX-ADJ1 (P1-V2, Zero Stock Restock)
steps:
1. Go to /transactions/stock-adjustment
   - Date: 2026-03-27
   - Notes: Stocktake — found 3 extra Medium cloth rolls
   - Line: P1-V2 (Medium), Direction IN, Qty 3, Unit Cost 1100, Reason: Physical stocktake surplus
2. Save Draft → verify P1-V2 still 0
3. Post
4. Check /products/detail/[P1_ID]:
   - P1-V2 stock = 3 (was 0)
   - Movements: ADJUSTMENT_IN entry qty +3
5. /reports/inventory-valuation: P1-V2 qty 3, value = 3×1100 = PKR 3,300
6. Verify: suppliers, customers, payment accounts all UNCHANGED
expected_result:
- P1-V2 stock: 3
- Movement: ADJUSTMENT_IN qty +3
- Inventory value increased by PKR 3,300
- No supplier/customer/account changes

name: [TC-1202] Post Stock Adjustment OUT TX-ADJ2 (P2-V2 Write-Off)
steps:
1. Stock adjustment:
   - Date: 2026-03-28
   - Notes: Damaged steel rods scrapped
   - Line: P2-V2 (12mm), Direction OUT, Qty 5, Unit Cost 80, Reason: Rust damage
2. Post
3. P2-V2 stock = 45 (50 - 5)
4. Movement: ADJUSTMENT_OUT qty -5
5. /reports/inventory-valuation: P2-V2 qty 45, value = 45×80 = PKR 3,600
expected_result:
- P2-V2 stock: 45
- Movement: ADJUSTMENT_OUT qty -5
- Inventory decreased by 5×80 = PKR 400

name: [TC-1203] Post Multi-Line Adjustment TX-ADJ3 (IN + OUT)
steps:
1. Multi-line adjustment, Date: 2026-03-29:
   - Line 1: P1-V1 (Small S), IN, Qty 2, Cost 1500, Reason: Found in back store
   - Line 2: P2-V1 (6mm), OUT, Qty 3, Cost 50, Reason: Allocated as samples
2. Post
3. P1-V1 stock = 22 (20 + 2)
4. P2-V1 stock = 72 (75 - 3)
5. Movements on P1: ADJUSTMENT_IN +2; Movements on P2: ADJUSTMENT_OUT -3
expected_result:
- P1-V1 stock: 22
- P2-V1 stock: 72
- Both movements recorded on their respective product detail pages

name: [TC-1204] Adjustment Validation Tests
steps:
Test A: Adjust P1-V2 OUT, Qty 3 (stock = 3 after ADJ1) → should work, result = 0 stock
Test B: Adjust P1-V2 OUT, Qty 1 (stock = 0 after Test A) → Expected: blocked 'Insufficient stock'
Test C: Qty = 0 on any line → Expected: validation error
Test D: Unit Cost = -100 → Expected: validation error or blocked
expected_result:
- Test A: P1-V2 = 0 stock after
- Test B: blocked — cannot go below zero stock
- Test C: zero qty blocked
- Test D: negative cost blocked
- If Test B allows negative stock: CRITICAL BUG
notes: Test A must be performed to set P1-V2 to 0 for the final state. Tests B,C,D are validation checks only.
